title: Malware writeup snippet — 'targeted attack against financial security mechanisms' + prevention Q4/Q5
html:
OSU writeup-in-progress at 1:54 a.m. — Yahir's analysis concludes the sample "represents a targeted attack against financial security mechanisms with clear data theft objectives," then asks Q4 (how to prevent the malware from executing) and Q5 (extra credit: implement the solution). His own scratch line: "OK I have there are a few clarifying things that I want to sort out."

malware analysis lab · network forensics · osu

related.label: Decompiled ned.exe (NED32.py) — Fernet ransomware targeting MAC `00:0C:29:EB:E8:84`
